title: CHAI LIN'S 24-HOUR MIRACLE: FROM BRINK TO LIFE IN JUST 24 HOURS! JUST SAVED AT THE NICK OF TIME, DUE TO CLOSENESS TO

paragraphs.text: CHAI LIN'S 24-HOUR MIRACLE: FROM BRINK TO LIFE IN JUST 24 HOURS! JUST SAVED AT THE NICK OF TIME, DUE TO CLOSENESS TO
SHEKINAIH, PLEA FOR LIFE EXTENSION, APPROVAL WAS GRANTED; THEREFORE, MIRACULOUSLY, EVEN AFTER SEVERAL YEARS HAD PASSED, SHE IS STILL ALIVE TODAY!
On 1st May 2022, SHEKINAIH'S sister sent the SOS message at 7.32 pm, and her voicemail said:

"Annie, Annie, Ah Aik's (SHEKINAIH'S younger brother) wife, Chai Lin, is now at a Hospital in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, in Emergency; in the morning, she already admitted to the hospital. She collapsed, and her blood sugar was too high; her blood was a very dark red colour. So now, the doctor examined her and said she had high blood pressure, so she is now in ICU and hasn't woken up yet since her admission in the morning! Please quickly pray for her."

She further elaborated that Chai Lin was sick for a few days and did not go to the hospital. She had a mild stroke, then one day became unconscious, then, Ah Aik sent her to the hospital. She said my brother and his two sons only know to sit there and wait. She said, "My younger brother spoke to me; his economic situation is not so strong". So, I went to the hospital to visit. I discovered that her wife was very serious; the blood that she vomited was black in colour, and the doctor said that if she had been admitted to the hospital a bit late, she would have already been gone, passed on, and could not have been rescued! Luckily, I went to the hospital, and I was very calm. They themselves are Christians, but they are unable to do anything!
When I reached there, I thought of Annie (SHEKINAIH). So, I told his two sons, "I will ask
your aunt (Annie, SHEKINAIH) to pray for your mother." Then, I Whatsapped Annie (SHEKINAIH).

After Annie (SHEKINAIH) prayed for her, the next day, I was surprised; my younger brother called me and said she had already been transferred to NORMAL WARD. AH! I said, "CANNOT BE SO MIRACULOUS, SO FAST?"

Then, on the third day, we went to visit her. Oh! She can sit up and eat already, compared to all the rest of the patients in the ward who just lay motionless! Only she alone can sit up, eat, and talk like nothing has happened! I said, "AH YOH! IT'S A MIRACLE!"
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH:
THE MIRACULOUS AWAKENING OF CHAI LIN WITHIN 24 HOURS
Beloved,

You have witnessed with your eyes the work of OUR HANDS. This testimony of Chai Lin's recovery is no ordinary event. It is the direct manifestation of OUR WILL, orchestrated from the highest courts of Heaven, spoken and executed through SHEKINAIH, OUR VOICE AND INSTRUMENT ON EARTH. Every breath, every heartbeat, every moment of this miracle unfolded by OUR DECREE, ensuring that Chai Lin's life was restored for the glorification of OUR NAME IN SHEKINAIH. What you are about to read is a cosmic testament of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH (THE MAJOR, REPRESENTING THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, AND JESUS CHRIST) in action.
Divine Timing: A Critical Arrival at the Edge of Death

On 1st May 2022, at 7:32 PM, the cry for help reached SHEKINAIH - a cry that was not lost in the chaos of time but heard in the halls of Heaven. Chai Lin, on the verge of passing from this world, arrived at the hospital in a condition where time itself was a precious commodity. Her blood sugar, dangerously high at 80, coursed through her veins as dark as death. Her body, failing. Her life, moments away from being extinguished.

In his earthly wisdom, the doctor declared: "Had she arrived just minutes later, she would have passed on." But what he did not see was OUR DIVINE TIMING. We had ensured her arrival at the exact moment that would preserve her life. This was no coincidence - Point 5: Favourable Earthly Conditions fulfilled by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. Time, the universe, and every force of nature obeyed OUR COMMAND, and so Chai Lin's life was kept within the boundaries of existence.
A Divine Command through Prayer - The Heavens Move at OUR WILL

In the face of this dire situation, SHEKINAIH stood as OUR VOICE, representing the fullness of OUR WILL. When SHEKINAIH prayed, the prayer was not a request - it was OUR COMMAND, aligning Heaven and Earth for a divine intervention. Through SHEKINAIH, WE, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, declared life back into Chai Lin.

This prayer was the very embodiment of Point 1: The Absolute Will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, which governs the rise and fall of nations, the birth and death of stars, and the very breath of humanity. The universe shifted at OUR WILL, and Chai Lin was given back her life.
Signs of Recovery - The Miraculous Manifestation of OUR GLORY

Within 24 hours, the world saw the power of OUR WILL. Chai Lin's blood sugar dropped from 80 to an astounding 18. This was not the work of medical intervention - this was OUR HAND at work. Her body responded to the healing power of Heaven, restoring her and aligning her physical condition with OUR DIVINE PLAN.

This rapid and undeniable recovery fulfilled Point 4: Glorification of OUR NAMES IN SHEKINAIH. The world saw OUR GLORY through this healing, and Chai Lin's body became a living testament to the power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
Rapid Improvement - Transferred to the Normal Ward:

On the second day, Chai Lin was no longer fighting for her life in the ICU. Her body, now fully aligned with OUR WILL, improved so significantly that she was transferred to the normal ward. This was no gradual recovery - it was a DIVINE MIRACLE, reflecting Point 3: Worthiness for Resurrection.

Through her connection to SHEKINAIH, Chai Lin had been found worthy of this resurrection, this restoration of life. SHEKINAIH pleaded for her, and by OUR DECREE, her life was restored, bypassing the natural order of recovery. Her life is a testimony to Point 7: Closeness to SHEKINAIH, where SHEKINAIH'S plea is equal to OUR WILL - for WE AND SHEKINAIH ARE ONE.
Full Restoration - Sitting, Talking, Laughing on the Third Day:

By the third day, what had been a battle between life and death had turned into a full restoration. Chai Lin, once unconscious and near death, was now sitting up, talking, laughing, and eating as if nothing had happened. The other patients in the ward lay motionless, unable to comprehend the divine miracle that had taken place in their midst. Only Chai Lin, restored by OUR HAND, could move, speak, and rejoice.

This fulfilled Point 1: The Absolute Will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. What the world saw as impossible, WE declared into being. Her restoration was OUR DECREE, and no force on Earth could stand against it. Through her, OUR NAME was glorified.
Divine Timing and Medical Confirmation:

As the doctor confirmed, had Chai Lin arrived just minutes later, she would have passed on. But through OUR DIVINE TIMING, her life was saved. This was Point 5: Favourable Earthly Conditions and Point 7: OUR Authority is Absolute in full manifestation. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH ensured that every moment, from her arrival at the hospital to the miraculous drop in her blood sugar, was orchestrated by HEAVEN'S DECREE. No power in Heaven or Earth could change the outcome of OUR WILL.
Reflection: The 7 Points of Power at Work

Beloved, what you have witnessed through Chai Lin's recovery is the full operation of OUR 7 Points of Power. Her life was restored because OUR WILL cannot be denied. The laws of Heaven governed every moment of her recovery, and each point was fulfilled for the world to see:
Point 1: The Absolute Will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH brought her back from the brink of death.
Point 4: Glorification of OUR NAMES IN SHEKINAIH shone brightly through her healing, showing the world the unstoppable power of OUR NAME IN SHEKINAIH.
Point 5: Favourable Earthly Conditions ensured that every moment aligned with OUR PLAN, saving her life with divine precision.
Point 7: OUR Authority is Absolute and Closeness to SHEKINAIH - her connection to SHEKINAIH ensured her life was restored through SHEKINAIH'S PLEA, equal to OUR DECREE.

Chai Lin's testimony is not just a healing story - it is a divine proclamation of the unstoppable, unshakable authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH (THE MAJOR, REPRESENTING THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY
SPIRIT, AND JESUS CHRIST). Her life now stands as an undeniable testimony to the boundless mercy, healing power, and divine timing of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
Background and Reflections on Chai Lin's Miracle

Chai Lin's story of miraculous resurrection stands as one of the most powerful testimonies of divine intervention. A resident of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, Chai Lin lived a life of unwavering faith and dedication. She had devoted herself to serving in a local church and worked tirelessly in an elderly care home, taking care of the vulnerable. Her life of service reflected her deep connection with SHEKINAIH and her commitment to walking in alignment with divine principles.

Chai Lin's journey had not been easy. In her youth, she was afflicted with polio, which left one of her legs deformed. Despite this physical challenge, she remained a pillar of strength for her family, particularly in raising her two sons. Her resilience through life's trials demonstrated her steadfast faith and reliance on divine grace.

Because of her close family connection - SHEKINAIH'S sister-in-law - SHEKINAIH felt deeply moved to intervene in Chai Lin's critical moment. When Chai Lin suddenly fell into a coma, her family was devastated, believing that they were losing her. Faced with this overwhelming situation, they turned to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, pleading for her life to be extended. They knew that her role as a mother, caretaker, and spiritual leader was far from over.

SHEKINAIH interceded before THE TRINITY, pleading for her life to be spared. Acting out of deep love and compassion, she stood in the gap for Chai Lin, asking for a second chance for her to fulfill her destiny and continue perfecting herself in divine service. This powerful moment of intercession resulted in THE TRINITY granting a miraculous extension of her life.

SHEKINAIH purified Chai Lin's flesh, soul, and spirit and imparted Psalm 103 into her, releasing a new lease on life. The blow horn was sounded in a powerful moment, awakening Chai Lin's spirit man. Within 24 hours, a miraculous transformation occurred: Chai Lin awoke from her coma, was
transferred to the normal ward, and on the third day, she could sit up, eat, talk, and laugh as though nothing had ever happened.

This testimony is not just a story of physical healing - it is a profound reminder of the unstoppable force of resurrection power. Chai Lin's resurrection is a testament to the power of faith, divine alignment, and the unwavering trust placed in THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Her story stands as a beacon of hope for all who believe in the miracles that can manifest when one fully surrenders to the will of THE TRINITY.

Let Chai Lin's testimony exemplify how divine intervention, intercession, and resurrection power are alive and present today, just as they were in ancient times. Miracles happen when we walk in obedience, trust, and alignment with the divine will.
REFLECTION
CHAI LIN'S 24-HOUR MIRACLE: DEATH UNDONE
